scripts.analyze: npm run analyze:unused && npm run analyze:deps
scripts.typecheck:deno: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" check --config deno.check.json --no-lock lib/env.ts services/bundler.ts handlers/app.ts handlers/discover.ts handlers/user.ts handlers/platform-mcp.ts src/worker-entry.ts

127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --allow-run --no-check --no-lock handlers/agent-grants-enforcement.test.ts handlers/admin-cloud-economics.test.ts scripts.test:marketplace: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --allow-run --no-check --no-lock services/marketplace.test.ts services/marketplace-request-validation.test.ts services/marketplace-maintenance.test.ts
scripts.test:full: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --allow-run --no-check --no-lock handlers/*.test.ts services/*.test.ts runtime/*.test.ts
scripts.test:gpu-live: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" run --allow-net --allow-env services/gpu/smoke-test.ts
